name: pdf
description: Read, create, inspect, render, and verify PDF files in Nexts.

interface.shortDescription: Read, create, and verify PDF files
interface.longDescription: Read, create, inspect, render, verify, and extract content from PDF files locally. Use PDF when the durable output or target is a PDF file and visual layout fidelity matters.
defaultPrompt: Review this PDF and verify its layout
Create a polished PDF from this content
Extract tables and text from this PDF
